About.WhyAnswer1: {op_name} is a project to collect and share prices of products around the world. It's a publicly available dataset that can be used for research, analysis, and more. {op_name} is developed and maintained by {off_url}.
About.WhyAnswer2: There are currently few companies that own large databases of product prices at the barcode level. These prices are not freely available, but sold at a high price to private actors, researchers and other organizations that can afford them.
About.HowAnswer1: We are crowdsourcing an open-source dataset of prices. Prices can be added by users via this web app, or via the official {off_url} mobile app. Retailers or third-party apps can contribute as well by using our {op_api_url}.
About.HowAnswer2: {op_name} is not only meant to store individual prices, but also consumption baskets, i.e. the list of products that people buy in a single shopping trip. This data is extremely interesting for researchers to analyze food consumption habits.
About.HowAnswer3: When possible, we ask contributors to provide a proof of the price, in the form of a photo of the price tag or receipt. This is to ensure data quality.
About.HowAnswer4: If you are providing a receipt as the proof image, it means you agree to submit your consumption basket to {op_name}. We will anonymize the receipt and make it publicly available, so that it can be used for research purpose. If you don't want to publicly share your receipt, you can still contribute by taking a picture of the price tag.
About.LicenseAnswer1: The price dataset is licensed under the {odbl_url}, which means that it can be used for any purpose, as long as you credit {op_name} and share any modifications you make to the dataset.
About.LicenseAnswer2: Images submitted as proof are licensed under the {ccbysa_url}.
About.WhatOFFAnswer: {off_url} là một tổ chức phi lợi nhuận thu thập và chia sẻ thông tin về các sản phẩm thực phẩm từ khắp nơi trên thế giới. Đây là một dự án hợp tác dựa trên sự tham gia của các tình nguyện viên để thu thập dữ liệu. {off_url} là cơ sở dữ liệu thực phẩm mở lớn nhất thế giới, với hơn 4 triệu sản phẩm tại 200 quốc gia.
About.WhyOFFAnswer: Price information is of paramount importance to understand food systems. It's a key factor in understanding the cost of food and to promote healthier diets. Opening price data is a way to make it easier for researchers, journalists, and citizens to have a better understanding of how food prices vary geographically and in time.
About.HowContributeAnswer: You can contribute by adding prices to the dataset. You can do so by using the web app, or via the official mobile app. An {op_api_url} is also available if you want to integrate {op_name} to your app. You need an {off_url} account to contribute.
About.HowUseData: How can I use the data?
About.HowUseDataAnswer1: The data is available under the {odbl_url}, which means that it can be used for any purpose, as long as you credit {op_name} and share any modifications you make to the dataset.
About.HowUseDataAnswer2: The {op_api_url} provides a way to easily access the data.
About.HowUseDataAnswer3: The data is also available as 3 gzipped JSONL dumps: {op_dumb_prices_url}, {op_dumb_proofs_url}, and {op_dumb_locations_url}.
About.HowContact: How can I get in touch?
About.HowContactAnswer: You can get in touch with us by sending an email to {off_contact_email_url}.
About.HowSupportAnswer: You can support {op_name} by contributing to the project, by sharing it with your friends and family, and by donating to {off_url}.
About.WhyOSM: Why do you ask for an {osm_name} ID when I add a price?
About.WhyOSMAnswer: We ask for an {osm_url} ID to be able to link the price to a specific shop. This is useful to be able to display the price on a map, and to be able to analyze regional or retailer price differences.
About.HowRetailer: I'm a retailer and I want to contribute prices. How can I do that?
About.HowRetailerAnswer: You can contribute prices by using our {op_api_url}. If you want to contribute prices at scale, please get in touch with us at {off_contact_email_url}.
About.WhyNoScraping: Do you consider scraping prices from retailers' websites?
About.WhyNoScrapingAnswer1: For legal and technical reasons, we don't consider scraping prices from retailers' websites as a valid way to contribute to {op_name}. We want to make sure that the prices we collect are accurate and up-to-date, and receiving scraped prices from contributors doesn't allow us to do that.
About.WhyNoScrapingAnswer2: Price scraping is a considered option in a future version of {op_name}, but it would be done by {op_name} itself so that we can have a proof of the price based on the HTML page.

Home.Title: Trang chủ
Home.Help: {op_name} is a project to collect and share prices of products around the world. It's a publicly available dataset that can be used for research, analysis, and more!

ProofPriceTagAssistant.Title: Trợ lý thẻ giá bằng chứng

Challenges.Title: Challenges
Challenges.Help:
Challenges are a way for the community to focus their efforts and gather prices of specific products. They usually last a month, and contributors are ranked by their contribution.

Check the ongoing challenges below to participate, or visit the past challenges data.

Validate.Title: Xác thực
Validate.Help:
After a few seconds, price tags information is automatically extracted from uploaded pictures, but help is still needed to validate its accuracy. This is done as a community effort.

For each price tag shown, check that the price, barcode or category are correct, fix them if needed and confirm. When you confirm a price, it's added to the public database and shared with the community.

Unreadable or invalid prices can be marked as errors. If you're unsure, you can ignore the price and let another contributor have a go at it.
